title: baccharoides mollis
intro: Baccharoides mollis, also known as the soft Baccharis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Baccharoides mollis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Baccharoides mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
